title: Phase 0 — Confirm & Specify
description: Close existential/decision risks; ratify spec + schemas; stand up build infra. Gate: M-001 green, M-002 verdict, M-010 ratified, infra in CI.

title: Phase 1 — Minimal Viable Core
description: Auditable kernel: Core IR + reference interpreter, binary/ternary, certified binary<->ternary swap, 1-2 VSA ops with bounds, minimal toolchain, interp<->AOT equivalence. Gate: SC-1/3/4, SC-2 for shipped ops, NFR-7.

title: Phase 2 — Full Unification & Verified Swaps
description: All four substrates co-equal; lossy swaps certified per-swap; verified-numerics checker; selection policy + packing selector. Gate: SC-2 all ops, SC-3 global, cert overhead within budget.

title: Phase 3 — Tooling, Projections & Acceleration
description: Dual-intelligibility tooling, JIT, factorization, BitNet acceleration, native-ternary forward path. Gate: SC-5a/b, JIT NFR-7 + speedup, projections validated.
